title: 14 · Binance Stocks → Lighter / Gate Stock Lead-Lag

panels.title: ${stock} — mid price across Binance / Lighter / Gate / Pyth (24/7 perps + oracle)
panels.description: Binance has TRADIFI_PERPETUAL stock perps (NVDA/TSLA/AAPL/AMD/MU/etc, 24/7). Compare against Lighter and Gate to find which venue leads.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${stock}','USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "lighter" FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${stock}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "gate" FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol IN (concat('${stock}','_USDT'), concat('${stock}','X_USDT')) AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "pyth" FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol='${stock}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: ${stock} — divergences in bp (Lighter-Binance / Gate-Binance / Pyth-Binance)
panels.description: How much does each venue trade above (positive) or below (negative) Binance's stock perp? Persistent gap = static premium. Wandering = lag.

targets.rawSql: WITH l AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${stock}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())), b AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${stock}','USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())) SELECT l.timestamp time, (l.mid - b.mid)/b.mid*10000 "Lighter-Binance" FROM l ASOF JOIN b ORDER BY l.timestamp

WITH g AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol IN (concat('${stock}','_USDT'), concat('${stock}','X_USDT')) AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())), b AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${stock}','USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())) SELECT g.timestamp time, (g.mid - b.mid)/b.mid*10000 "Gate-Binance" FROM g ASOF JOIN b ORDER BY g.timestamp

WITH p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol='${stock}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())), b AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${stock}','USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())) SELECT p.timestamp time, (p.mid - b.mid)/b.mid*10000 "Pyth-Binance" FROM p ASOF JOIN b ORDER BY p.timestamp

panels.title: All stocks — Binance vs others (last 5min, mean & std of basis in bp)
panels.description: Pivot view across all stocks. High |mean_X-Bin| = persistent premium. High std = mean-revert candidate. ticks_<X> shows venue liquidity.

targets.rawSql: WITH bin AS (SELECT timestamp, replace(symbol,'USDT','') sym, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDAUSDT','TSLAUSDT','AAPLUSDT','AMZNUSDT','METAUSDT','MSFTUSDT','GOOGLUSDT','AMDUSDT','MUUSDT','INTCUSDT','SPYUSDT','QQQUSDT','ORCLUSDT','AVGOUSDT','SNDKUSDT','COINUSDT','HOODUSDT','PLTRUSDT','MSTRUSDT','TSMUSDT','XAUUSDT','XAGUSDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())), lh AS (SELECT timestamp, symbol sym, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDA','TSLA','AAPL','AMZN','META','MSFT','GOOGL','AMD','MU','INTC','SPY','QQQ','ORCL','AVGO','SNDK') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())), gt AS (SELECT timestamp, replace(replace(symbol,'_USDT',''),'X','') sym, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDAX_USDT','TSLAX_USDT','AAPLX_USDT','AMZNX_USDT','METAX_USDT','GOOGLX_USDT','MSFT_USDT','AMD_USDT','MU_USDT','INTC_USDT','ORCLX_USDT','SPYX_USDT','QQQX_USDT','ASML_USDT','XAU_USDT','XAG_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())), lb AS (SELECT lh.sym, ((lh.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000) bp FROM lh ASOF JOIN bin ON sym), gb AS (SELECT gt.sym, ((gt.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000) bp FROM gt ASOF JOIN bin ON sym), lb_agg AS (SELECT sym, count() ticks_LB, round(avg(bp),2) mean_LB, round(stddev_samp(bp),2) std_LB FROM lb GROUP BY sym), gb_agg AS (SELECT sym, count() ticks_GB, round(avg(bp),2) mean_GB, round(stddev_samp(bp),2) std_GB FROM gb GROUP BY sym) SELECT lb_agg.sym, ticks_LB, mean_LB, std_LB, ticks_GB, mean_GB, std_GB, round(abs(mean_LB),2) abs_LB FROM lb_agg LEFT JOIN gb_agg ON lb_agg.sym=gb_agg.sym ORDER BY abs_LB DESC
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='NVDAUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "lighter" FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='NVDA' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "gate" FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='NVDAX_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "pyth" FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol='NVDA' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='TSLAUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "lighter" FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='TSLA' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "gate" FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='TSLAX_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "pyth" FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol='TSLA' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
